MODULE: cosmos.incidents.pagerduty_integration
FILE: cosmos/incidents/pagerduty_integration.py (499 lines)
CATEGORY: incidents

DESCRIPTION: cosmos PagerDuty Integration

"When the pager goes off, everyone runs away...
 except Zoidberg, he runs toward food."

PagerDuty integration for incident management.

CLASSES:
- PagerDutyIncident: PagerDuty incident representation.
- PagerDutyIntegration: PagerDuty integration for incident management.

Features:
- Create and manage in
  Methods: async def create_incident(self, service_id: str, title: str, body: str=None, urgency: str='high', es
  Methods: async def get_incident(self, incident_id: str) -> Optional[PagerDutyIncident]
  Methods: async def list_incidents(self, statuses: List[str]=None, service_ids: List[str]=None, urgencies: Lis
  Methods: async def update_incident(self, incident_id: str, status: str=None, title: str=None, urgency: str=No
  Methods: async def acknowledge_incident(self, incident_id: str, from_email: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def resolve_incident(self, incident_id: str, from_email: str, resolution: str=None) -> bool
  Methods: async def add_note(self, incident_id: str, content: str, from_email: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def get_notes(self, incident_id: str) -> List[Dict]
